title: Raspberry Pi Image Description Provisioning
description: The Image Description Provisioning (IDP) document describes a Raspberry Pi image for secure on-device provisioning. It combines image layout information (partition table, partition images, sizes, filesystem types and attributes) with a Provisioning Map (PMAP) that defines how the image is deployed — including partition creation, LUKS encryption, and security attributes. IDP documents are consumed by Raspberry Pi provisioning tools such as rpi-sb-provisioner.

IGversion.description: The IDP document format version in semver format (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH). Provisioning tools use this field to select the correct parsing and provisioning path, enabling backward compatibility across document format revisions.

IGmeta.description: Build configuration metadata derived from the rpi-image-gen environment. For images built outside rpi-image-gen these fields must be populated manually.

IGconf_device_class.description: The Raspberry Pi device family the image is intended for.

IGconf_device_variant.description: An optional device variant identifier, e.g. memory size or edition (8G, lite). Use 'none' if no variant applies.

IGconf_device_storage_type.description: The storage media type the image is intended for, as seen by the OS. Determines which block device the provisioning tool will target.

IGconf_device_sector_size.description: The logical sector size in bytes of the target storage device. Used to guide image layout decisions such as alignment and padding.

IGconf_image_version.description: The version string of the image, typically matching the artefact version set at build time.

IGconf_image_outputdir.description: The output directory path where the image and associated artefacts were written by the build.

attributes.description: Image-level attributes describing the overall image geometry and identity.

image-name.description: The base name of the image, used to identify the image artefact.

image-size.description: The physical size of the raw disk image in bytes.

image-palign-bytes.description: The partition alignment of the image in bytes. Accepts integer values or genimage-style size suffixes (e.g. 8M).

layout.description: The image layout, comprising the partition table, partition images, and provisioning map.

partitiontable.description: The partition table descriptor, including type and disk identifier.

partitionimages.description: A map of partition entries keyed by partition name, each describing a partition's geometry, filesystem type, and attributes.

provisionmap.description: The embedded Provisioning Map (PMAP), defining how partitions are assigned, ordered, and optionally encrypted on the target device. See the PMAP schema for full details.

uuidGPT.description: A standard UUID string (case-insensitive), e.g. F5C56D0D-B6D9-4353-9F7C-9E8FBF89D864.

uuidVFAT.description: A vfat volume ID in 4-byte hexadecimal format, e.g. 1234-ABCD.

partitionTable.description: Describes the disk partition table type and identifier.

label.description: The partition table type. 'gpt' for GUID Partition Table, 'dos' for MBR.

id.description: The disk identifier. A UUID for GPT disks, or a 4-byte hex value (e.g. 0x1234abcd) for MBR disks.

partitionImages.description: A collection of partition image entries, keyed by partition name.

partitionImage.description: Describes a single partition image, including its geometry, filesystem type, and attributes.

name.description: An arbitrary string identifying this partition. Used as the key in the partitionimages map and referenced by name in the PMAP.

in-partition-table.description: Whether this partition image has a corresponding entry in the partition table. Represented as a string boolean.

size.description: The physical size of the partition image in bytes. Must be at least one sector (512 bytes).

image.description: The filename of the raw partition image file.

type.description: The filesystem or image type of this partition, e.g. ext4.

bootable.description: Whether the partition is flagged as bootable. Represented as a string boolean.

mountpoint.description: The mountpoint of this partition on the running device, e.g. /boot or /.

partition-type-uuid.description: The GPT partition type UUID, identifying the type of partition (e.g. Linux filesystem, EFI System).

partition-label.description: The GPT partition label, a human-readable name for the partition entry in the partition table.

partition-uuid.description: The GPT partition UUID, uniquely identifying this partition entry in the partition table.

fs_label.description: The filesystem label assigned to this partition.

fs_uuid.description: The filesystem UUID. A standard UUID for most filesystem types, or a 4-byte hex vfat volume ID.

simage.description: The filename of the sparse image file containing this partition's data, e.g. boot.sparse. Required for fastboot provisioning flows.
